prompt: Create a dark epic fantasy 2D concept-art illustration of a silver-haired storm queen standing in heavy rain on a gothic castle rooftop or battlement, shown from the thighs up in a dramatic three-quarter pose. She has very long silver-white hair braided over one shoulder, a delicate spiked crown, pale skin, and an intentionally obscured face covered by a flat muted gray rectangular mask with no facial features. Dress her in ornate royal battle regalia: a fitted white and midnight-navy corset gown, layered skirt panels, gold filigree chains and thornlike metal ornaments, jeweled arm guards, clawed gauntlets, a fur-trimmed shoulder mantle, and a long dark cape flowing violently in the wind. In her left hand she holds a tall jagged magical staff or spear made of black metal and glowing magenta-pink crystal, surrounded by spiraling energy rings, sparks, and floating shard fragments. The background is a stormy medieval-fantasy cityscape with sharp cathedral towers, fortress spires, hanging banners, distant rooftops, rain streaks, and turbulent moonlit clouds; use cold violet-gray lighting with bright magenta highlights, cinematic backlight, rim lighting on wet armor, high contrast, intricate detail, painterly anime game art style, ultra-detailed fantasy character design, dynamic composition, widescreen 16:9.
